compiled_state.title: Add dso:ui-designer row to CLAUDE.md agent routing table
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## What
Update the Named-Agent Dispatch table in CLAUDE.md to add the dso:ui-designer entry.

## Authorization
This task explicitly authorizes editing CLAUDE.md per Never-Do rule 18 (safeguard file). The story scope explicitly lists 'CLAUDE.md agent table (add ui-designer entry)' as IN-scope.

## Change Required
In the Named-Agent Dispatch table (the | Agent | Model | Dispatched by | table), add the row:
| `dso:ui-designer` | sonnet | `/dso:preplanning` Step 6 (design work dispatch) |

Position: add the row in alphabetical order relative to existing agent entries.

## Acceptance Criteria
- CLAUDE.md agent dispatch table includes dso:ui-designer with model=sonnet and dispatch context
- Table formatting is consistent with existing rows (aligned pipes)
- No other content in CLAUDE.md is modified

## testing_mode: UPDATE
